articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Australian police uncover 3 tons of cocaine - NPR
articles.description: The drug was found on June 19 in plastic tubs buried in bunkers hidden beneath three shipping containers. Two Sydney residents were arrested. They face potential sentences of life in prison.
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia Police found 2.7 metric tons (3 tons) of cocaine on a property on Sydney's outskirts in Australia's largest ever seizure of the drug, officials said on Monday.
